testimonial1.name: Sandra Meier
testimonial1.text: Since we got the chatbot, the phone barely rings anymore – but the appointment books are fuller than ever. Our clients love being able to book 24/7.

testimonial2.name: Thomas Kramer
testimonial2.text: The bot qualifies my leads automatically and books viewings while I sleep. After 3 months, I can't imagine working without it.

testimonial3.name: Marco Rossi
testimonial3.text: Finally, my team doesn't have to answer the phone all the time. The chatbot takes reservations and answers menu questions – flawlessly and friendly.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know before getting started.
FAQ.a1: No, not at all. We take care of everything – from configuration to installation. You get a ready-made widget code that you embed into your website via copy/paste. It takes less than 5 minutes.
FAQ.q2: How long does the setup take?
FAQ.a2: Usually 24–48 hours. After a short briefing call, we configure your bot and deliver it ready to go. The integration into your website is then done in minutes.
FAQ.a3: Yes, 100%. All data is processed according to European data protection standards. We rely on secure servers and transparent data processing. A corresponding notice is displayed in the chat widget.
FAQ.q4: Can I customize the bot for my business?
FAQ.a4: Absolutely. We customize tone, language and responses individually for your business. With the Premium package, your bot even gets its own name, avatar and individual persona.
FAQ.q5: What happens when the bot can't answer a question?
FAQ.a5: The bot recognizes when it reaches its limits and automatically forwards the request to you – via email or directly to your CRM. No lead is lost.
FAQ.q6: Can I cancel the service at any time?
FAQ.a6: Yes. Our contracts are cancellable monthly, with no minimum term. We're confident you'll stay because you're satisfied – not because you have to.

CookieBanner.text: We use cookies and analytics to provide you with the best experience and improve our website.

ChatWidget.greeting: Hello! 👋 I'm the ChatBoost AI demo bot. How can I help you?
ChatWidget.demoHint: This is a demo – your bot will be individually customized
ChatWidget.responseCost: Our packages start at €399 one-time + €79/month. The Pro package with appointment booking and WhatsApp costs €799 + €149/month. Want me to show you more details?
ChatWidget.responseHow: It's simple: 1) Tell us what your bot should do. 2) We configure everything for you. 3) You get a widget code for your website. Done! All in under 48h.
ChatWidget.responseDemo: Great! Just scroll down to the contact form or write to us at info@chatboost-ai.de. We'll build you a free demo bot!
ChatWidget.responseFallback: Great question! For the best answer, please contact us directly via the form below or book a free consultation call. We'll get back to you within 24 hours!
ChatWidget.responsePrice: We offer three packages: Starter (€399 + €79/month), Pro (€799 + €149/month) and Premium (€1,499 + €249/month). The Pro package is the most popular! Scroll down to 'Pricing' for all details.
ChatWidget.responseAppointment: Sure! You can book a free 15-minute call right away. Just scroll down to the 'Book a Call' section – you'll find our calendar there.
ChatWidget.responseWhatsApp: Yes, our Pro and Premium packages include WhatsApp integration! Your chatbot will then be available not only on your website but also on WhatsApp.
ChatWidget.responseGDPR: Data protection is very important to us. All our chatbots are GDPR compliant. Data is processed securely and we strictly adhere to European data protection standards.
ChatWidget.responseRealEstate: For real estate agents, our bots are particularly effective: automatic lead qualification, property viewing bookings, and 24/7 availability. Up to 340% more qualified leads!
ChatWidget.responseRestaurant: Perfect for restaurants: automatic reservations, menu information, allergen info and opening hours – all around the clock. Up to 60% fewer phone calls!
ChatWidget.responseSalon: Salons & barbers love our bots: appointments are automatically booked, reminders sent, and no-shows reduced by up to 87%!
ChatWidget.responseDuration: From order to finished bot, it usually takes 24–48 hours. The integration into your website is then done in under 5 minutes!
ChatWidget.responseGreeting: Hello! Great to have you here! How can I help you? You can ask me anything about our AI chatbot services.
ChatWidget.responseThanks: You're welcome! If you have more questions, I'm here. Or just scroll down to the contact form to speak directly with our team.

Checkout.successDescription: Thank you for your order! We'll get in touch within 24 hours to start setting up your chatbot.
Checkout.cancelDescription: You cancelled the payment process. Don't worry – nothing was charged. You can select a package again anytime.
